title: Happy Creeper
description: Turn creepers into survival companions by weakening, taming, healing, recoloring, and fighting alongside them.
body:
# **Happy Creeper**
Short summary:

Turn creepers into survival companions by weakening, taming, healing, recoloring, and fighting alongside them.

# **Overview**
Happy Creeper is a NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that gives creepers a full companion gameplay loop.

Instead of only running from them, you can approach them safely with a creeper head, weaken them with a special biscuit, tame them, and keep them with you as a combat companion.

This mod is built around survival-friendly mechanics rather than creative-only gimmicks.

# **How It Works**
- Wear a Creeper Head to get close safely.
- Feed the creeper an Anti-Blast Biscuit to weaken it.
- Feed the weakened creeper a Sweet Gunpowder Biscuit to tame it.
- Right-click your tamed creeper with an empty hand to switch between follow and stay.
- Heal it with Gunpowder or another Sweet Gunpowder Biscuit.
- Tamed Creeper Features
- Follows its owner and can be told to stay
- Teleports back if it gets left behind
- Changes dimension with its owner
- Resyncs after the owner respawns
- Defends the owner from hostile mobs
- Attacks mobs the owner is fighting
- Uses a small contact blast attack instead of normal self-destruction
- Dies with a larger non-destructive final explosion
- Has increased health compared to a normal creeper
- Visual Features
- Weakened creepers show a continuous visual effect
- Tamed creepers use a custom happy green texture by default
- Tamed creepers can be recolored with dyes
- Rainbow Biscuit unlocks a smooth rainbow mode that cycles through colored creeper textures

# Items
- Biscuit
- Anti-Blast Biscuit
- Sweet Gunpowder Biscuit
- Rainbow Biscuit

# Current Release Notes
This release is intended as an alpha playtest build.

The full taming loop is implemented and playable, but balance and polish are still in progress.

# License summary
- You may use this mod freely.
- You may include the original unmodified jar in modpacks, launchers, mirrors, and server packs.
- You may not publish modified versions without my written permission.
- Approved derivatives must include credit and a link to the official project page.

# Requirements
NeoForge mod for the Minecraft versions listed on this page.
Requires Java 21.
